title: Smoky Empanadas with Tamarind Salsa
description: A twist on traditional empanadas, these smoky empanadas are filled with a tangy tamarind salsa, giving them a unique flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: smoky cheese
ingredients.notes: shredded, such as cheddar or Monterey Jack

instructions: Roll out the empanada dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of the smoky cheese in the center of each dough circle.
Top with a sprinkle of cumin and a pinch of salt.
Fold the dough in half to form a half-moon shape, and press the edges together to seal.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops with a little water and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the empanadas are baking, prepare the tamarind salsa by mixing together the tamarind paste, onion, and cumin.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the empanadas hot with a dollop of tamarind salsa and a sprinkle of vegan sour cream, if desired.
